name: Swells
description: Multi-model stereo reverb with a built-in SWELL generator, nine models, lo-fi variants, freeze and reverse modes, and extensive CV control over both reverb and modulation behavior.

controls.name: MODEL X / Y / Z
controls.description: Selects the reverb bank.

controls.name: MODEL 1 / 2 / 3
controls.description: Selects the model within the active bank.

controls.name: LO-FI
controls.description: Selects the amount of model-specific degradation or modification.

controls.name: PREDLY
controls.description: Sets pre-delay time.

controls.name: SIZE
controls.description: Sets the virtual room size or delay scale.

controls.name: DECAY
controls.description: Sets decay or feedback amount.

controls.name: LO-DAMP
controls.description: Sets low-frequency damping.

controls.name: HI-DAMP
controls.description: Sets high-frequency damping.

controls.name: EBB
controls.description: First model-specific slider; function depends on the selected model and lo-fi state.

controls.name: FLOW
controls.description: Second model-specific slider; function depends on the selected model and lo-fi state.

controls.name: EQ
controls.description: Tilts the wet signal toward high or low emphasis.

controls.name: INPUT
controls.description: Sets the level of audio sent into the reverb.

controls.name: MIX
controls.description: Sets the dry / wet blend.

controls.name: LEVEL Attn (INPUT)
controls.description: Sets how much the LEVEL CV input modulates INPUT.

controls.name: LEVEL Attn (MIX)
controls.description: Sets how much the LEVEL CV input modulates MIX.

controls.name: RISE
controls.description: Sets SWELL attack time.

controls.name: FALL
controls.description: Sets SWELL release time.

controls.name: THRESH
controls.description: Sets the trigger threshold for SWELL generation.

controls.name: CV Attn 1-8
controls.description: Sets modulation amount and polarity for the eight parameter CV inputs.

controls.name: IN / SC / OUT
controls.description: Selects which signal source drives the SWELL envelope follower.

controls.name: SWELL
controls.description: Manually fires the SWELL generator.

controls.name: FREEZE
controls.description: Captures a slice of audio for endless sustain.

controls.name: REVERSE
controls.description: Reverses playback through the pre-delay path.

controls.name: BURST
controls.description: Triggers a momentary effect such as noise or extra pre-delay feedback.

controls.name: TRIG
controls.description: Assignable trigger input for SWELL, FREEZE, BURST, REVERSE, or reverse sync.

controls.name: DRIVE
controls.description: Enables input saturation.

controls.name: EF GAIN
controls.description: Sets the gain of the signal feeding the envelope follower.

controls.name: MODE
controls.description: Selects SWELL trigger mode.

controls.name: HPF -> VERB
controls.description: Sets the reverb input high-pass cutoff.

controls.name: LPF -> EF
controls.description: Sets the low-pass cutoff for the SWELL source.

controls.name: TYPE
controls.description: Selects the BURST type.

controls.name: ALT
controls.description: Accesses alternate functions printed in grey on the panel.

inputs.name: IN L
inputs.description: Left audio input. Normalled to the right input when the right jack is empty.

inputs.name: TRIG
inputs.description: Assignable trigger input for SWELL, FREEZE, BURST, REVERSE, or reverse sync.

inputs.name: SC
inputs.description: Sidechain input that can drive the SWELL generator.

inputs.name: LEVEL CV
inputs.description: Modulates INPUT and MIX through the two LEVEL attenuverters.

inputs.name: MOD 1-8
inputs.description: Eight parameter modulation inputs, each with its own attenuverter.

outputs.name: SWELL
outputs.description: Dedicated CV output from the SWELL generator.

behaviors.name: Nine-model stereo reverb
behaviors.trigger: select a MODEL bank and position
behaviors.description: Swells offers nine stereo reverb models, from conventional halls and plates to stranger algorithms, with lo-fi variants that alter each model differently.

behaviors.name: SWELL generator normalization
behaviors.trigger: adjust RISE, FALL, THRESH, or source mode
behaviors.description: The SWELL generator behaves like an envelope follower with four source modes and is normalled to the reverb parameters for self-modulation.

behaviors.name: External modulation bus
behaviors.trigger: patch CV into MOD 1-8 or LEVEL CV
behaviors.description: The eight parameter inputs plus LEVEL CV can move the module away from static reverb and into animated, performance-oriented territory.

behaviors.name: Freeze and reverse effects
behaviors.trigger: press FREEZE or REVERSE, or assign TRIG
behaviors.description: Freeze can hold a moment indefinitely, while Reverse turns the incoming audio around the pre-delay path for reversed ambience.

behaviors.name: Burst accents
behaviors.trigger: press BURST or assign it to TRIG
behaviors.description: Burst injects noise or feedback-style accent events that can make swells and transitions feel more animated.

behaviors.name: Send / return mode
behaviors.description: Swells can act as a send/return effect when the dry path is removed, which makes it easier to process external loops or parallel buses.

patchIdeas.name: Lush hall
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo synth into IN L/R · MODEL set to a hall or plate · MIX around noon · SWELL off · classic wide reverb for pads and chords.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Swells:
* MODEL X/Y/Z: X
* MODEL 1/2/3: 1
* LO-FI: OFF
* MIX: noon

Synth:
Output:

- Synth (Out L) -> Swells (IN L)
- Synth (Out R) -> Swells (IN R)
- Swells (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Swells (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Sidechain ducked space
patchIdeas.patch: Kick into SC · pad into IN L/R · SWELL output to a VCA CV input or downstream filter cutoff · the reverb breathes around the kick without manual automation.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Swells:
* MODEL X/Y/Z: Y
* MODEL 1/2/3: 2
* LO-FI: MIN
* RISE: slow
* FALL: medium

Kick:
Pad:
VCA:
Output:

- Kick (Out) -> Swells (SC)
- Pad (Out L) -> Swells (IN L)
- Pad (Out R) -> Swells (IN R)
- Swells (SWELL) >> VCA (CV)
- Pad (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Freeze cloud
patchIdeas.patch: A short chord enters IN L/R · FREEZE catches the tail · SWELL keeps moving a filter or VCA in the rest of the rack · endless sustain without a separate sampler.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Swells:
* MODEL X/Y/Z: Z
* MODEL 1/2/3: 3
* FREEZE: on
* MIX: wet

Clock:
Filter:
Output:

- Clock (Out) t> Swells (TRIG)
- Synth (Out L) -> Swells (IN L)
- Synth (Out R) -> Swells (IN R)
- Swells (SWELL) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Swells (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Swells (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Reverse shimmer
patchIdeas.patch: REVERSE on · long pre-delay · input from a simple drone · the reversed tail turns a static source into a moving wash.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Swells:
* MODEL X/Y/Z: Z
* MODEL 1/2/3: 1
* REVERSE: on
* PREDLY: long
* LO-FI: MAX

Drone:
Output:

- Drone (Out) -> Swells (IN L)
- Drone (Out) -> Swells (IN R)
- Swells (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Swells (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Bursty room
patchIdeas.patch: Clocked triggers to TRIG · BURST assigned to trigger mode · short percussive hits become noisy, blooming reverb events with their own rhythmic accent layer.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Swells:
* MODEL X/Y/Z: X
* MODEL 1/2/3: 2
* BURST: on
* IN / SC / OUT: IN

Clock:
Drum:
Output:

- Clock (Out) c> Swells (TRIG)
- Drum (Out) -> Swells (IN L)
- Drum (Out) -> Swells (IN R)
- Swells (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- Swells (OUT R) -> Output (R)
